basic_details.job_title: IPPB Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: India Post Payments Bank has released the official Chief Operating Officer (COO) Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website www.ippbonline.bank.in. Eligible candidates aged between 40 to 55 years with a qualification of Bachelor’s Degree with minimum 55% marks along with extensive banking/financial sector experience can apply online from 01 May 2026 to 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

application_fee.details: Fee to be paid online only (Debit/Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI etc.). Fee is non-refundable.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India or fulfill the eligibility conditions as mentioned in the notification. | Age Limit (as on 01.04.2026): Not less than 40 years and not more than 55 years. | Educational Qualification: | Mandatory: Full-time Regular Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University/Institute. | Desirable: | MBA / PGDM / PGDBM / PGDBA in Finance / Post Graduate Degree in Statistics / Mathematics / Economics / Econometrics. Certifications in Data Analytics / Data Governance. | Preferred Certifications: CAIIB, CISI, CBCP, FRM/PRM, CAMS, CIA, Six Sigma (Green/Black Belt), etc. | Post Qualification Work Experience (as on 01.04.2026): | Minimum 18 years of experience in Banks or Financial Institutions. Out of which, at least 10 years specifically in handling Operations or Business Processes. In the last 5 years, must have held a position not more than two levels below MD & CEO of a Public Sector or Private Sector Bank/FI for at least 2 years.

selection_process: The selection will be done through the following stages:
experience & profile) Psychometric Test (converted to score out of 100) Interview (100 Marks)
A merit list of top 3 candidates will be prepared. CTC negotiation will be held with the top-ranked candidate.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official IPPB website. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Click on the "Apply Online" link under Current Openings.
Register with your Name, Contact details, and Email ID to generate Provisional Registration Number and Password.
Login and fill the online application form carefully with all personal, educational, and experience details.
Upload the following scanned documents: Recent Passport Size Photograph Signature Left Thumb Impression Hand-written Declaration Updated Resume (PDF)
Pay the application fee of ₹750/- online.
Preview the application, verify all details, and submit.
Take a printout of the final submitted application form and e-receipt for future reference.
Apply Online at: https://ippbonline.bank.in (Link will be active from 01.05.2026)
important_instructions: Before applying, candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria. Only online applications will be accepted. No changes/corrections are allowed after final submission. Application fee once paid will not be refunded. Candidates serving in Government/PSUs must submit NOC at the time of interview. All correspondence will be sent via email only. Keep your email ID active. Suppression of facts or submission of false information will lead to disqualification. The Bank reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify the recruitment process at any stage. For any queries, write to: [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for India Post Payments Bank COO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 is 21 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How can I apply for IPPB Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: You can apply online by visiting the official IPPB website, opening the Current Openings section, clicking on the COO recruitment link, registering with your mobile number and email ID, filling the form, uploading documents and paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the IPPB COO post?
faq.answer: The age of the candidate for the IPPB Chief Operating Officer post should be between 40 and 55 years as on 1 April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What educational qualifications are required for India Post Payments Bank COO 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full‑time regular bachelor’s degree with at least 55 percent marks from a recognized university, while a postgraduate qualification such as MBA, PGDM or PGDBA in Finance or a PG degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics or Econometrics is desirable along with data‑oriented certifications.

faq.question: Q5. How much experience is required for IPPB Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must possess at least 18 years of experience in banks or financial institutions, including a minimum of 10 years in operations or business processes and having worked within two levels below the MD & CEO for at least two years in the last five years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for India Post Payments Bank COO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all candidates for the IPPB Chief Operating Officer post is ₹750, inclusive of intimation charges, and must be paid online via debit card, credit card, internet banking or UPI.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IPPB COO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting of applications, a psychometric test which is converted to a 100‑mark score and a 100‑mark interview, with the final merit list prepared using 25 percent weightage for the psychometric test and 75 percent for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is the IPPB COO post permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The Chief Operating Officer post at India Post Payments Bank is purely contractual, offered initially for a period of three years and extendable by up to two additional years based on performance and bank requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the selected IPPB Chief Operating Officer be posted?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the IPPB COO Recruitment 2026 will be initially posted at the Corporate Office in New Delhi, but the position is transferable and the officer can be placed anywhere in India as per bank policy.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any preferred professional certifications for IPPB COO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, professional certifications like CAIIB, CISI, CBCP, FRM or PRM, CAMS, CIA and Six Sigma Green or Black Belt are preferred and will strengthen the candidate’s profile for the Chief Operating Officer role.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for India Post Payments Bank COO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 is 21 May 2026 up to 11:59 PM.
